name: whiteboard-brainstorm
description: Bidirectional whiteboard brainstorming on an Excalidraw canvas for Claude Code and Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Visual brainstorming on a shared Excalidraw canvas.
interface.longDescription: Start a whiteboard session, share the canvas URL, and respond with stickies, mind-nodes, annotations, and panels on the same board.
defaultPrompt: Use whiteboard-brainstorm when the user wants a visual brainstorming session on a shared canvas.
